contract_meta.phase_name: Vision Synthesis - Strategic Cheat Sheet Extraction
contract_meta.enhancement: Extract and synthesize vision documents from historical planning artifacts to create executive-level strategic cheat sheet for developer handoff and roadmap alignment.
contract_meta.rationale: The repository contains extensive planning documents in docs/Goal_&_Vision_inspirational_only/01_Roadmaps_&_Agents capturing the original vision for a fully autonomous AI coding system. These documents represent months of strategic thinking but are scattered across multiple files in varying formats. Before advancing to next autonomy milestones (HITL/MCP/Policy Gates), we need a single authoritative vision document that: (1) distills what the system must become, (2) clarifies success criteria and constraints, (3) provides developer handoff materials, (4) ensures roadmap decisions align with original intent. This phase synthesizes those documents into a concise, non-technical cheat sheet suitable for both owner review and technical planning.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Read all historical planning documents in docs/Goal_&_Vision_inspirational_only/01_Roadmaps_&_Agents, extract vital information about autonomous AI coding vision, and synthesize a comprehensive executive-level cheat sheet documenting WHAT/WHY/HOW/WHO/WHEN/CONSTRAINTS for developer handoff.
project.scope: Document discovery, content extraction, synthesis into structured cheat sheet format, validation against CDI quality standards, delivery of VISION_CHEAT_SHEET.md artifact.
project.estimated_time: Discovery: 2-3 hours, Extraction: 3-4 hours, Synthesis: 2-3 hours, Validation: 1-2 hours. Total: 8-12 hours (~1-2 working days)
project.work_profile: Documentation analysis (Markdown reading), information extraction, strategic synthesis, executive communication document creation
out_of_scope: Implementation of any features described in vision documents
New contracts for future phases (this is documentation only)

execution_model.verification_strategy: AI agent reads all source documents in specified directory, extracts structured information per framework (WHAT/WHY/HOW/WHO/WHEN/CONSTRAINTS), synthesizes into template-driven cheat sheet, validates completeness via checklist, human validates final output.
execution_model.description: Agent discovers all markdown files in target directory, reads each file systematically, extracts information into structured categories, synthesizes findings into executive cheat sheet using provided template, validates against quality checklist, reports completion with file path.

constraints: Must follow provided template structure exactly
Source files must be indexed with contributions documented
Must be <= 10 pages when printed (concise executive summary)
stack_compliance.validation: Human review + checklist validation + markdown linting

observability.description: Track document discovery, extraction progress, synthesis quality, and validation outcomes.

content_validation.description: Validate cheat sheet completeness and quality

tasks.title: Discover and index all source documents
tasks.description: Find all markdown files in docs/Goal_&_Vision_inspirational_only/01_Roadmaps_&_Agents, create index with file paths and sizes, output discovery artifact.
actions: List each file with relative path
success_criteria: All .md files in target directory discovered
File index created with paths and metadata
Discovery artifact generated and valid JSON
No files missed or excluded without reason

tasks.title: Extract WHAT information (capabilities and features)
tasks.description: Read all discovered files, extract information about what the system needs to do, what features were planned, what problems it solves, what workflows it supports.
actions: Document source file for each extracted item

tasks.title: Extract WHY information (purpose and goals)
tasks.description: Extract why the system was conceived, what pain points it addresses, what the ultimate goal is, what value it provides.
actions: Document source file for each extracted item

tasks.title: Extract HOW information (approach and methodology)
tasks.description: Extract technical approaches considered, patterns/architectures mentioned, tools/technologies referenced, integration points discussed.
actions: Document source file for each extracted item

tasks.title: Extract WHO information (stakeholders and components)
tasks.description: Extract who the users are, what agents/components are involved, what external systems integrate, who makes decisions.
actions: Document source file for each extracted item

tasks.title: Extract WHEN information (timeline and phases)
tasks.description: Extract what phases were planned, what sequence of implementation was envisioned, what dependencies exist, what milestones were defined.
actions: Document source file for each extracted item

tasks.title: Extract CONSTRAINTS information (boundaries and anti-patterns)
tasks.description: Extract approaches explicitly rejected, technologies forbidden, boundaries that must be respected, tradeoffs acknowledged.
actions: Document source file for each extracted item

tasks.title: Create vision cheat sheet from extracted information
tasks.description: Synthesize all extracted information into structured cheat sheet using provided template, ensuring concise executive-friendly language, proper attribution, and complete coverage of all sections.
actions: Add Next Steps for Developer Handoff
success_criteria: Cheat sheet file created at specified location
Document is concise (<= 10 pages when printed)
Markdown is valid and properly formatted

tasks.title: Validate cheat sheet against quality checklist
tasks.description: Run through 14-point validation checklist ensuring all quality criteria met, document validation results, confirm readiness for human review.
actions: Check: All source files read and indexed
Check: Vision statement is clear and compelling (2 paragraphs max)
Check: Core goals are specific and measurable (3-7 items)
Check: Constraints are explicit and actionable
Check: Architecture concepts are high-level but clear
Check: TL;DR section could stand alone
Check: Source document index lists every file analyzed
Check: Document is under 10 pages when printed
Check: Language is accessible to non-technical owner
success_criteria: Markdown lint passes with zero warnings

tasks.title: Collect evidence artifacts for Phase 21
tasks.description: Gather all artifacts produced during vision synthesis: discovery notes, extraction notes, validation results, final cheat sheet.
actions: Document file sizes and line counts

discovery_first.description: Agent must discover all source files before beginning extraction

systematic_extraction.description: Agent must extract information category-by-category, not file-by-file
systematic_extraction.rationale: Prevents duplication and ensures thematic coherence

source_attribution.description: Every extracted item must cite source file

template_adherence.description: Agent must follow cheat sheet template structure exactly

validation_before_delivery.description: Agent must validate against checklist before marking complete

ai_executor_guidelines.read_systematically: Read all source files completely before beginning synthesis
ai_executor_guidelines.extract_verbatim: When extracting quotes, preserve exact wording and cite source
ai_executor_guidelines.be_concise: Cheat sheet must be executive summary, not comprehensive documentation
ai_executor_guidelines.maintain_attribution: Every claim must be traceable to source document
ai_executor_guidelines.use_simple_language: Owner is non-technical; avoid jargon where possible
ai_executor_guidelines.structure_strictly: Follow template structure exactly; do not add or remove sections
ai_executor_guidelines.validate_thoroughly: Run through all 14 checklist items before marking complete
ai_executor_guidelines.document_conflicts: If source documents contradict, note discrepancies in cheat sheet

governance_note.for_human: This contract creates a strategic artifact (vision cheat sheet) from historical planning documents. It does NOT implement features or create technical specifications. The deliverable is a non-technical executive summary suitable for owner review and developer handoff. Review the cheat sheet for accuracy and completeness before using it to guide future roadmap planning.
